allow: Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const {Sequelize}=require\('sequelize'\); const s=new Sequelize\(process.env.DB_NAME,process.env.DB_USER,process.env.DB_PASS,{host:process.env.DB_HOST,dialect:'mysql',logging:false}\); s.authenticate\(\).then\(\(\)=>console.log\('DB OK'\)\).catch\(e=>console.error\('DB FAIL:',e.message\)\);")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Communities:', len\(d['data']\), [c['community_name']+'\('+c['community_code']+'\)' for c in d['data']]\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Districts:', len\(d['data']\), 'first:', d['data'][0]['district_name']\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Available colleges \(MALE\):', d['pagination']['total'], '| rows:', len\(d['data']\), '| sample:', d['data'][0]['college_name'] if d['data'] else 'none'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Years:', [\(y['year_label'], y['is_active']\) for y in d['data']]\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Total:', d['pagination']['total'], '| rows:', len\(d['data']\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(' ', c['community_name'], '|', len\(c.get\('castes',[]\)\), 'castes'\) for c in d['data']]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Communities: {len\(d[\\"data\\"]\)} | First: {d[\\"data\\"][0][\\"community_name\\"] if d[\\"data\\"] else \\"none\\"}'\)" curl -s http://localhost:5000/api/v1/districts)

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); p=d.get\('pagination',{}\); print\(f'Colleges total={p.get\(\\"total\\"\)} | Sample: {d[\\"data\\"][0][\\"college_name\\"] if d[\\"data\\"] else \\"none\\"}'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if k!='data'}, indent=2\)\); print\('Count field in response:', d.get\('count'\), 'Pagination:', d.get\('pagination'\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('total colleges:', d['pagination']['total']\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Communities:', len\(d['data']\), '| First:', d['data'][0]['community_name'], '| Castes:', len\(d['data'][0].get\('castes',[]\)\)\)")
